summary: Assert an edit preserved per-band frequency energy outside the edited region (within a relative tolerance); FAILS with the worst band's energy delta when a region is over-blurred or sharpened.

inputs.name: after
inputs.doc: The edit's output Image/Field1 (same extent as `before`).

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: An optional coverage mask marking the EDITED region; preservation is checked over its complement (the whole image when absent).

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The assertion report: per-band before/after energy and the verdict.

params.name: bands
params.doc: The number of bands (= pyramid levels), finest first.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: The maximum allowed relative per-band energy change.

params.name: phase
params.doc: The odd-size rounding rule for the pyramid level extents.

params.name: severity
params.doc: Whether a failure fails the run (error), warns, or is a metric.
